blurb_en:
Netflix disclosed this week that AI is now inside roughly 300 of its productions in 2026 — doing crowd scenes, battle sequences, and establishing shots at half the cost of what a traditional second unit would charge.
• The headline case: 17 minutes of its American Revolution docuseries "The American Experiment" were produced twice as fast and at half the cost, per CEO Ted Sarandos on the Q2 earnings call.
• The tool doing most of the work is InterPositive, a $600 million AI post-production startup Netflix acquired from Ben Affleck in March — it modifies existing footage rather than generating scenes from text prompts.
• Other productions cited: Indian sports thriller "Glory" and Brazilian soccer miniseries "Brasil 70: A Saga do Tri."
• AI is used almost entirely in post-production and invisible to viewers until the credits roll.
• For anyone in camera and imaging work, "twice as fast at half the cost" deserves a second read.
blurb_zh:
Netflix本周在财报中披露，AI目前已介入其2026年约300部作品的制作——承担群众场面、战役场景和建立镜头，成本是传统第二摄制组的一半。
• 最具体的案例：美国革命纪录片系列《美国实验》中有17分钟的AI辅助画面，CEO特德·萨兰多斯在第二季度财报电话会议上称，速度是传统方式的两倍，成本减半。
• 背后的主要工具是InterPositive，Netflix今年3月以6亿美元收购，最初来自本·阿弗莱克——它不是文字生成视频，而是对已有素材进行后期处理。
• 另被提及的作品：印度体育惊悚剧《荣耀》和巴西足球迷你剧《1970：冠军传奇》。
• AI几乎全部用于后期制作，片尾字幕才是透露答案的地方。
• 对摄影摄像从业者来说，"两倍速度、一半成本"值得停下来品一品。
verification_notes: Q2 earnings disclosure confirmed via Variety (primary), Fortune (July 16), Kotaku, Medianama. CEO Ted Sarandos named on record. InterPositive $600M acquisition confirmed. 17 minutes / twice as fast / half cost confirmed across multiple earnings call summaries.

blurb_en:
Twenty-nine nations signed the founding agreement for the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization (WAICO) in Shanghai on July 17, with UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres witnessing and the United States not on the list.
• Xi Jinping attended the 2026 WAIC summit in person — his first appearance in the event's nine-year history — and called WAICO "an important milestone in the history of AI development."
• Founding members include Russia, Brazil, Indonesia, Malaysia, South Africa, Pakistan, Cuba, and Venezuela, headquartered in Shanghai.
• China's pitch to the Global South: open-source AI models offered as "public goods" and 5,000 AI training opportunities for developing nations over five years.
• Structurally, it echoes the Non-Aligned Movement of the Cold War — nations formally opting out of the dominant power's governance framework. The subject this time is who writes the rules for artificial intelligence.
blurb_zh:
7月17日，29个国家在上海签署世界人工智能合作组织（WAICO）创始协议，联合国秘书长安东尼奥·古特雷斯出席见证，美国不在名单之列。
• 习近平亲自出席2026年世界人工智能大会——这是他在这一已有九年历史的峰会上的首次亮相——并称WAICO是"人工智能发展史上的重要里程碑"。
• 创始成员国包括俄罗斯、巴西、印度尼西亚、马来西亚、南非、巴基斯坦、古巴和委内瑞拉，总部设在上海。
• 中国向全球南方国家的游说逻辑：将开源AI模型作为"公共品"提供，五年内开放5000个AI培训名额。
• 结构上颇似冷战时期的不结盟运动——一批国家正式选择退出主导大国的治理框架。这一次，争夺的是谁来制定人工智能的规则。
verification_notes: WAICO founding confirmed via Al Jazeera, Xinhua (English), CGTN, Caixin Global, and TechTimes. Xi keynote confirmed via CGTN full text. 29 founding countries confirmed. UN SG Guterres attendance confirmed. Shanghai HQ confirmed. Global South framing confirmed from Xi's speech.

blurb_en:
Anthropic rang last call on Claude Fable 5's free trial on July 13: the third and final extension runs out tomorrow night at 11:59 PM PT, and then the tab opens.
• From July 20, Fable 5 requires prepaid usage credits: $10 per million input tokens, $50 per million output tokens.
• The timeline: launched June 9, grounded by US export controls June 12, returned June 30, first free trial expired June 22 — then extended to July 7, extended again to July 12, extended once more to July 19.
• Three separate "final" deadlines in under a month.
• No fourth extension has been announced.
• At $50 per million output tokens, a serious day of coding with Fable 5 gets expensive quickly.
blurb_zh:
7月13日，Anthropic为Claude Fable 5的免费试用期敲响了最后的钟：第三次、也是最后一次延期将于明晚太平洋时间23:59结束，账单随即开始计算。
• 7月20日起，Fable 5将仅接受预付信用额度：每百万输入token 10美元，每百万输出token 50美元。
• 时间线：6月9日上线，6月12日遭美国出口管制下架，6月30日回归，6月22日首次免费期到期——随后延期至7月7日，再延期至7月12日，再延期至7月19日。
• 不到一个月内，三次"最后"截止日期。
• 暂无第四次延期公告。
• 每百万输出token 50美元，认真用Fable 5写一天代码，账单来得相当可观。
verification_notes: July 19 extension confirmed via BleepingComputer, gHacks, Digital Trends. $10/$50 per million tokens pricing confirmed. Prior extensions to July 7 and July 12 confirmed via DigitalApplied and TechTimes. Timeline reconstructed from multiple sources.

blurb_en:
Anthropic is giving out extra credit. Claude for Teachers, launched July 14, gives every verified K-12 educator in the US free premium access for a full year — no separate subscription, no student data collected for model training.
• The package: a teaching skills library, curricula mapped to all 50 states' academic standards, and integrations with eight ed-tech platforms: ASSISTments, Brisk Teaching, Canva Education, Coteach, Diffit, Eedi, MagicSchool, and Snorkl.
• A FERPA-compliant data processing addendum is included — the clause that typically kills AI deals in schools.
• The competitive backdrop: OpenAI is in classrooms via ChatGPT Edu, Google Gemini runs on Chromebooks. Anthropic is entering through the teacher's lounge.
• Whether "free for teachers" eventually becomes "charged to districts" is a question saved for next year.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic开始给出额外分数。7月14日推出的Claude for Teachers向美国所有经核实的K-12教师免费开放高级Claude功能，为期整整一年，无需额外订阅，学生数据不用于训练模型。
• 套餐内容：专为教学设计的技能库、覆盖全美50个州课程标准的内容，以及与八个教育科技平台的集成：ASSISTments、Brisk Teaching、Canva教育版、Coteach、Diffit、Eedi、MagicSchool和Snorkl。
• 附带符合FERPA要求的数据处理协议——这条款通常是AI进校园的最大障碍。
• 竞争格局：OpenAI通过ChatGPT Edu布局校园，Google Gemini已在Chromebook上运行。Anthropic选择从教职室切入。
• "教师免费"是否意味着"学区付费"——答案留给了明年。
verification_notes: Launch date July 14 confirmed via The Hill, 9to5Mac, Forbes, Chalkbeat. Free access through June 2027 confirmed. FERPA addendum confirmed. Ed-tech integrations confirmed via Anthropic's official page and The Hill. No student data training confirmed.
